children.heading: Determination by Secretary
children.label: a Determination by Secretary
children.text: In addition to the assistance provided under , if the Secretary determines that the livestock emergency also requires the implementation of one or more of the assistance programs described in subsection (b), the Secretary shall implement such programs.section 1471d of this title

the donation of feed owned by the Commodity Credit Corporation for use in feeding livestock stranded and unidentified as to its owner, including the cost of transporting feed to the affected area, during such period as the Secretary, by regulation, may prescribe;

children.label: A
children.text: installing pipelines (if that is the least expensive method) or other facilities, including tanks or troughs, for livestock water;

children.label: B
children.text: construction or deepening of wells or ponds for livestock water; or

children.label: C
children.text: developing springs or seeps for livestock water,
reimbursement of not to exceed 50 percent of the cost of burning prickly pear cactus to make it suitable for animal feed; and

making commodities owned by the Commodity Credit Corporation available to livestock producers through the use of a catalog that specifies lots of a size that are economically feasible for a small producer to obtain by means of certificate exchanges.

children.heading: Water development projects for 1988 and 1989 emergencies
children.label: c Water development projects for 1988 and 1989 emergencies
children.text: The Secretary may make available at least $25,000,000 to provide special assistance under subsection (b)(2) for livestock emergencies in 1988 and 1989.
